title: When war hits a hospital: how medical teams manage in Tel Aviv
summary_full: You would expect complete chaos when a hospital must cope with a war, but that's without factoring in the resilience of staff and considerable pragmatic foresight. There is much European hospitals could learn
summary_public: You would expect complete chaos when a hospital must cope with a war, but that's without factoring in the resilience of staff and considerable pragmatic foresight. There is much European hospitals could learn

IL.label: positive
IL.evidence: resilience of staff and considerable pragmatic foresight
